---
title: "Ablation Study"
---

## Design

- **Goal**: quantify each component's individual contribution to final performance
- **Claim addressed**: Claim 2 — Component X is necessary for the observed gain
- **Protocol**: start from the full model; remove one component at a time; measure metric drop
- **Run command**:

```bash
# Full model
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method>

# Without Component A
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> method.use_comp_a=false

# Without Component B
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> method.use_comp_b=false
```

```{dot}
//| label: fig-ablation-design
//| fig-cap: "Ablation: systematic component removal"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.5
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    Full [label="Full Model", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    WoA [label="w/o Comp A"]
    WoB [label="w/o Comp B"]
    WoC [label="w/o Comp C"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    DA [label="Δ Comp A", fillcolor="#4a2040"]
    DB [label="Δ Comp B", fillcolor="#4a2040"]
    DC [label="Δ Comp C", fillcolor="#4a2040"]
  }
  subgraph row4 {
    rank=same
    Rank [label="Contribution Ranking", fillcolor="#375a7f", width=5.0]
  }

  Full -> WoA  Full -> WoB  Full -> WoC
  WoA  -> DA   WoB  -> DB   WoC  -> DC
  DA   -> Rank  DB -> Rank  DC -> Rank
}
```

---

## Results

> Fill in after running. Report metric delta relative to the full model.

| Configuration | Metric A | Metric B | Δ vs. Full |
|--------------|----------|----------|------------|
| Full model | — | — | 0.0 |
| w/o Component A | — | — | — |
| w/o Component B | — | — | — |
| w/o Component C | — | — | — |
| Minimal (baseline) | — | — | — |

- **Most important component**: [component name] — removing it drops [metric] by [Δ]
- **Least important component**: [component name] — safely removable if compute is constrained

```{dot}
//| label: fig-ablation-results
//| fig-cap: "Contribution of each component (larger drop = more important)"
//| fig-width: 6.5
//| fig-height: 2.8
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.6, nodesep=0.45]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph col1 {
    rank=same
    CA [label="Comp A\n(high impact)", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    CB [label="Comp B\n(medium)",      fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    CC [label="Comp C\n(low)",         fillcolor="#4a2040"]
  }
  subgraph col2 {
    rank=same
    Full [label="Full Model", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }

  CA -> Full
  CB -> Full
  CC -> Full
}
```

---

## Interaction Effects

- **A + B synergy**: combining A and B yields [more / less] than the sum of individual contributions — [explanation]
- **Redundancy**: [components X and Y] partially overlap in function; removing both hurts less than expected
- **Order sensitivity**: [if applicable] initialisation order of components affects convergence

```{dot}
//| label: fig-interaction
//| fig-cap: "Component interaction: synergy vs. redundancy"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  CA   [label="Comp A",     fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  CB   [label="Comp B",     fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Syn  [label="Synergy",    fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  Red  [label="Redundancy", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
  Out  [label="Net Gain",   fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  CA -> Syn  CB -> Syn
  CA -> Red  CB -> Red
  Syn -> Out  Red -> Out [style=dashed, color="#e74c3c"]
}
```

---

## Takeaway

- **Claim 2 status**: ⬜ Pending — will be updated after runs complete
- **Key finding**: [placeholder — state the main insight from this ablation]
- **Action**: [if a component proves unnecessary, note whether to remove from final model]
